features: HOME SPA: These Aromatherapy Elysium Spa Oils are sure to add some "Zen" into your lifestyle. Try the different fragrances, they offer a unique sense of wellbeing. Simply add a few drops into a bath to create your own home spa. Use with an oil burner for home fragrance, add to a carrier oil and massage into the skin.
100 PercentESSENTIAL OIL: Enjoy the pure natural scent of a 100 Percentfrankincense oil
AROMA DIFFUSERS: The Elysium Spa Oils are suitable for using with an aroma diffuser. Add a few drops to the diffuser to enjoy the fragrance.
ULTRASONIC DIFFUSERS: The Elysium Spa Oils are suitable for using with an ultrasonic diffuser. Add a few drops to the water in the diffuser to enjoy the fragrance.
description: Product Description These Aromatherapy Elysium Spa Oils are sure to add some "Zen" into your lifestyle. Try the different fragrances, they offer a unique sense of wellbeing. Simply add a few drops into a bath to create your own home spa. Use with an oil burner for home fragrance, add to a carrier oil and massage into the skin. Enjoy the pure natural scent of a 100 Percentfrankincense oil. The Elysium Spa Oils are suitable for using with an aroma diffuser, add a few drops to the diffuser to enjoy the fragrance. Always follow the manufacturer's appliance guidelines. 100 PercentNatural oil, 10ml. Directions Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use.
